meaning: adj.法律许可的,守法的,受自然规律支配的
examples: The detention of the fugitive was lawful.
Lawful job search sites offer levels of privacy protection.
However, he will not go until he receives the lawful signal.
Without a lawful Social Security number, undocumenteds will never participate in Social Security or Medicare.
Yee was charged last week with two counts of failing to obey a lawful general order.
